data.title: Pattern Group files $400 million IPO to expand global ecommerce platform
data.description: The company plans to use the proceeds for working capital, general corporate purposes, and potential acquisitions or investments in complementary technologies and businesses.

data.title: Hertz to become first fleet partner to sell vehicles on Amazon Autos
data.description: Customers in Dallas, Houston, Los Angeles, and Seattle can browse, finance and buy Hertz vehicles directly on Amazon and pick them up at a nearby Hertz Car Sales location.

data.title: Costco turns to GrowthLoop to build audience for its retail media network
data.description: GrowthLoop's platform brings artificial intelligence to Costco's retail media network, offering tools to help segment audiences and optimize ad messaging.

data.title: Nordic B2B companies accelerate AI adoption, but caution on risks
data.description: The Nordic Digital Commerce in B2B 2025 report, based on interviews with 920 decision-makers in manufacturing, distribution, and wholesale, found that 24% of companies are already using AI to improve digital operations and customer experience.

data.title: Ohio Peterbilt launches ecommerce for truck parts across the Midwest
data.description: The site redesign also aims to improve usability on desktop and mobile devices, with faster search and streamlined ordering.
